flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Methodist University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.0k → $41.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Methodist University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.0k → $41.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Methodist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Methodist University rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (22.8% → 29.3%).
